creator: knu@idaemons.org
text:
Hi.

  As the originator of this PR, I'd like it to be closed.  I've been
thinking that we should push the authors until they get imap-utils
much refined to merge into imap-uw.

  I mean I find it (so far) so rough that I don't dare guarantee its
quality nor its security, etc. :-(

-- 
                           /
                          /__  __
                         / )  )  ) )  /
Akinori -Aki- MUSHA aka / (_ /  ( (__(  <knu@idaemons.org>

"If you choose not to decide you still have made a choice."
